inline_literal.description: Inline code span rendered in monospace font with no further parsing

reference.description: External hyperlink reference with display text and target URL

role.description: Interpreted text role for semantic markup such as :ref:, :doc:, :class:, :func:

directive.description: Block-level extension mechanism for images, code blocks, notes, and custom content

substitution.description: Substitution reference replaced with defined content, used for repeated text and images

footnote.description: Footnote definition and reference for additional information at document bottom
